innateAbility.name: One Man Army
innateAbility.description: Grants Axe temporary strength based on Axe's current armor.Allied heroes venturing too close to Axe passively disables this effect linearly.

abilities.name: Berserker's Call
abilities.description: Axe taunts nearby enemy units, forcing them to attack him, while he gains bonus armor for the duration.

abilities.name: Battle Hunger
abilities.description: Enrages an enemy unit, causing it to take damage over time until it kills another unit or the duration ends.The debuff-affected enemy unit is slowed as long as it is facing away from Axe.

abilities.name: Counter Helix
abilities.description: After a set number of incoming attacks, Axe performs a helix counter attack, dealing pure damage to all nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Culling Blade
abilities.description: Axe spots a weakness and strikes, dealing pure damage.

talents.left: +8% Move Speed per active Battle Hunger
talents.right: +3s Culling Blade Kill Buff Bonus Duration
